groups.title: Writing & Humanities Core
groups.notes: Writing sequence must be completed by the end of sophomore year.

groups.title: Quantitative & Analytics Core
groups.notes: Statistics and economics must be completed before upper-division finance.

groups.title: Social Science & Ethics
groups.notes: COMM 205 satisfies the oral communication requirement.

groups.title: Business Core
groups.notes: Accounting sequence must be completed prior to finance and strategy.

groups.title: Strategy & Analytics
groups.notes: STRAT 450 is the capstone and should be taken in the final year.

groups.title: Business Electives
groups.notes: Select electives that align to finance, marketing, or operations pathways.
